content.text:
I can clearly see atom C:19 and its neighbor atoms. Based on the zoomed view, I can identify the following neighbor atoms covalently connected to atom 19:

**Neighbor atoms of atom 19 (Carbon):**
1. Atom 25 (H) - Hydrogen
2. Atom 17 (C) - Carbon
3. Atom 15 (C) - Carbon
4. Atom 20 (N) - Nitrogen

**geomconf_index:** 6853

These 4 atoms (H:25, C:17, C:15, and N:20) are all covalently bonded to atom C:19. I can see in the image that C:19 forms bonds with each of these atoms - the hydrogen H:25 is directly attached, C:17 is part of the carbon chain, C:15 connects to the adjacent carbon, and N:20 (with its associated oxygen O:21) is bonded to C:19 completing its valency.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 19, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
